cookieBanner.title: Cookie settings
cookieBanner.description: We use cookies to improve your experience on our site. You can customize your preferences or accept all cookies.

necessary.title: Necessary cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the site to function. They enable navigation and the use of basic features.

analytics.title: Analytics cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the site by collecting anonymous information.

marketing.title: Marketing cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used to display relevant advertisements and measure the effectiveness of campaigns.

preferences.title: Preference cookies
preferences.description: These cookies allow us to remember your choices and preferences to personalize your experience.

ip.title: 4. Intellectual Property

copyright.title: 4.1 Copyright
copyright.content: All content (texts, images, videos, graphics, logos, icons, sounds, software) on this website is protected by copyright and trademark law. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or adaptation of all or part of the site's elements, by any means or process, is prohibited without prior written authorisation.

brands.title: 4.2 Trademarks
brands.content: Trademarks and logos appearing on the site are registered trademarks. Their reproduction or use without authorisation is strictly prohibited.

ip.olympic: Olympic symbols, the Olympic emblem, the Olympic flag, the Olympic motto, Olympic anthems and the terms 'Olympic Games' and 'Olympiad' are the exclusive property of the International Olympic Committee.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: ESN InfoEvent disclaims all liability for:
items: Any inaccuracy, imprecision or omission regarding information available on the website
Any damage resulting from fraudulent intrusion by a third party
Any damage caused to the user's computer system

outgoing.title: 6.1 Outgoing links
outgoing.content: This website may contain links to other websites. ESN InfoEvent has no control over these sites and disclaims all liability for their content.

incoming.title: 6.2 Incoming links
incoming.content: Creating hyperlinks to this website requires prior written agreement from ESN InfoEvent. All requests must be sent to

dataLink.title: 7. Personal Data Protection
dataLink.content: For information regarding the processing of your personal data, please consult our

cookiesLink.title: 8. Cookies
cookiesLink.content: For information regarding the use of cookies on this website, please consult our

law.title: 9. Applicable Law
law.content: This legal notice is governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and after failure of any attempt to find an amicable solution, French courts shall have sole jurisdiction.

dev.title: 10.1 Design and development
dev.content: Website designed and developed by ESN InfoEvent as part of an educational project.

photos.title: 10.2 Photo and illustration credits
photos.content: Photographs and illustrations used on this website are the property of ESN InfoEvent or used with the permission of their respective authors.

object.title: 1. Purpose
object.content1: These Terms of Use (hereinafter 'ToU') define the terms and conditions of use of the official ticketing platform for the Paris 2024 Olympic and Paralympic Games (hereinafter 'the Platform'), as well as the rights and obligations of users.
object.content2: Accessing and using the Platform implies unconditional acceptance of these ToU by the user.

items.definition: Any natural person accessing the Platform, whether registered or not.
The User's personal space giving access to the Platform's services.
An access pass to an event of the Paris 2024 Olympic and Paralympic Games.
A competition, ceremony or manifestation forming part of the official Games programme.

conditions.title: 3.1 Access conditions
conditions.content: Access to the Platform is open to any person with an internet connection. Some features, particularly ticket purchasing, require the creation of an Account.

account.title: 3.2 Account creation
account.content1: To create an Account, the User must provide accurate and complete information. They agree to update this information if it changes.
account.content2: The User is responsible for the confidentiality of their login credentials and all actions performed from their Account.

process.title: 4.1 Purchase process
process.content: Ticket purchases are made exclusively online via the Platform. The User selects the desired Event, seat category and number of tickets.

price.title: 4.2 Prices and payment
price.content: Ticket prices are shown inclusive of tax in euros. Payment is made by credit card or any other payment method offered on the Platform.

confirmation.title: 4.3 Order confirmation
confirmation.content: Every validated order is confirmed by email. The electronic ticket is available in the User's personal space.

nominal.title: 5.1 Personal tickets
nominal.content: All tickets are personal and non-transferable, except via the official resale platform authorised by the organiser.

access.title: 5.2 Access control
access.content: Entry to Olympic venues requires presentation of a valid Ticket and an identity document matching the name on the Ticket.

withdrawal.title: 6.1 Right of withdrawal
withdrawal.content: In accordance with Article L.221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal does not apply to leisure service contracts to be provided on a specific date.

byOrganizer.title: 6.2 Cancellation by the organiser
byOrganizer.content: In the event of an Event cancellation, the User will be refunded the ticket amount within 30 days.

liability.title: 7. Liability
liability.content1: ESN InfoEvent strives to ensure the availability and proper functioning of the Platform. However, it cannot be held liable for temporary service interruptions due to maintenance or updates.
liability.content2: The User is solely responsible for the use of their Account and the information they provide.

ip.title: 8. Intellectual Property
ip.content: All elements of the Platform (logos, texts, images, videos, etc.) are protected by intellectual property rights. Any unauthorised reproduction or use is strictly prohibited.

changes.title: 9. Changes to the ToU
changes.content: ESN InfoEvent reserves the right to modify these ToU at any time. Users will be notified of any changes by email or notification on the Platform.

law.title: 10. Applicable Law
law.content: These ToU are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, French courts shall have sole jurisdiction.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.content: For any questions regarding these ToU, you can contact us at:

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content1: ESN InfoEvent is committed to protecting the privacy of users of its ticketing platform.
intro.content2: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store and protect your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act.

controller.title: 2. Data Controller
controller.intro: The data controller for personal data is:

collected.title: 3. Data Collected
collected.intro: We collect the following categories of data:

transaction.title: 3.2 Transaction data
items: Payment information (processed by our secure payment provider)

purpose.title: 4. Processing Purposes
purpose.intro: Your personal data is collected for the following purposes:
items: Sending communications related to your purchases

legalBasis.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.intro: Processing of your data is based on the following legal grounds:

items.definition: for managing your orders and providing our services.
for sending marketing communications and using certain cookies.
for fraud prevention and improving our services.
for compliance with our accounting and tax obligations.

retention.title: 6. Retention Period
retention.intro: Your personal data is retained for the following periods:
items: Account data: 3 years after last activity
Marketing data: 3 years after last contact
Cookies: depending on their nature (see our cookie policy)

recipients.title: 7. Data Recipients
recipients.intro: Your data may be shared with the following recipients:
items: Our internal departments (ticketing, marketing, customer service)

transfers.title: 8. International Transfers
transfers.content: Your data is primarily processed within the European Union. In the event of transfer to a third country, we ensure that appropriate safeguards are in place (standard contractual clauses, adequacy decision).

rights.title: 9. Your Rights
rights.intro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:

items.definition: obtain a copy of your personal data.
restrict the processing of your data.
receive your data in a structured format.
withdraw your consent at any time.

rights.contact: To exercise your rights, contact our Data Protection Officer at:

security.title: 10. Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, modification, disclosure or destruction. These measures include data encryption, strict access controls and regular security audits.

cookiesLink.title: 11. Cookies
cookiesLink.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience. For more information, please consult our

contact.title: 12. Contact and Complaints
contact.content: For any questions regarding this policy or your personal data, contact us at:
contact.cnil: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés):

whatIs.title: 1. What is a Cookie?
whatIs.content1: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when you visit a website. It allows the site to remember information about your visit, such as your language preferences or other settings.
whatIs.content2: Cookies can be 'session cookies' (deleted when you close your browser) or 'persistent cookies' (stored for a set period).

necessary.title: 2.1 Strictly necessary cookies
necessary.content: These cookies are essential for the website to function and cannot be disabled. They are generally set in response to your actions (login, form filling, privacy preferences).

analytics.title: 2.2 Analytics cookies
analytics.content: These cookies allow us to measure website traffic and analyse navigation to improve our services. The data collected is anonymised.

marketing.title: 2.3 Marketing cookies
marketing.content: These cookies are used to show you relevant advertisements based on your interests. They also limit the number of times you see an advertisement.

preferences.title: 2.4 Preference cookies
preferences.content: These cookies remember your choices (language, region, theme) to personalise your experience on the website.

management.title: 3. Cookie Management
management.intro: You can change your cookie preferences at any time by clicking the button below:

browser.title: 3.1 Via your browser
browser.content: You can also configure your browser to accept or refuse cookies:

refusal.title: 4. Consequences of Refusal
refusal.content: Refusing certain cookies may degrade your user experience. For example, the site will not be able to remember your preferences or shopping cart. Strictly necessary cookies cannot be refused as they are essential to the website's operation.

thirdParty.title: 5. Third-party Cookies
thirdParty.content: Some cookies may be placed by third-party partners (Cloudflare for security and performance, payment providers). These partners have their own privacy policies which we invite you to consult.

contact.title: 6. Contact
contact.content: For any questions regarding our use of cookies, contact our Data Protection Officer:

validation.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters
validation.lastNameMax: Last name must be at most 30 characters
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions
